next_action_label: Rebuttal to the […] argument that 'Cassiopée and/or Julien Mercier deny any connection with Quiz Mania: they contend that Tohu-Bohu is operated by an unidentified third-party entity not named in the proceedings, that the judgment of the Tribunal judiciaire de Paris dated 18/12/2020 concerns only Carto Royale 4 and not Tohu-Bohu, and that no exhibit formally identifies them as publishers of Tohu-Bohu': Produce the certified legal notices (mentions légales) of Tohu-Bohu identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer; assemble a body of converging circumstantial evidence (faisceau d'indices convergents) consisting of the TJ Paris judgment of 18/12/2020 regarding Julien Mercier's role at Cassiopée + the findings recorded in Exhibit 18.6 + any commercial dealings or public communications by Cassiopée/Julien Mercier concerning Tohu-Bohu; and, if necessary, seek a pre-trial discovery order (mesure d'instruction in futurum) pursuant to Article 145 of the Code of Civil Procedure (CPC) compelling disclosure of the developer account registration data held by the […]
